notes: Charge nurse handoff to incoming charge covering 5 patients across different acuity levels: comfort-care pancreatic cancer, post-STEMI with stent, sickle cell vasoocclusive crisis, post-cholecystectomy with fever, and advanced Parkinson's with aspiration pneumonia. Includes staffing concerns and operational details mixed with clinical data. Tests extraction from the longest and most complex multi-patient handoff with interleaved clinical and administrative content.
